name: Beef and Cabbage Joes II
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cooking Oil with Hot Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Optional: Chopped chives or green onion tops for garnish.
1. Cook and stir the meat until browned. Drain off the excess fat.
2. Add Worcester sauce, hot pepper sauce, salt, and pepper to the meat, stirring at medium heat for several minutes.
3. Set aside in a serving dish.
4. Add 2 tbsp cooking oil with hot pepper sauce to a frying pan.
5. Cook onion, celery, green pepper, and cabbage in the frying pan until vegetables are cooked. Cook covered over medium heat for 5-10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat and return meat to the frying pan with the vegetables. Stir to mix veggies and meat together.
7. Add water, catsup, and salsa; stir and simmer covered at low temperature for 10 minutes.
8. Mix cornstarch with about 2 tbsp water, then stir into the mixture. Keep stirring until the liquid begins to thicken.
9. Split buns in half and toast. Place both halves onto a plate.
10. Spoon the meat mixture over each half of the bun.
11. Sprinkle grated cheese on top and finish with a large dollop of sour cream.
12. Garnish with chopped chives or green onion tops.
